title: Comprehensive Audit Fix — CI/CD Security, Agent Consistency, and Broken Features
author: UCC INGO Dev Team
description: Fix all critical issues identified by CodeRabbit review, Trivy security scanning, zizmor actions analysis, and OSV scanner on the comprehensive audit PR (#1). This PRD covers GitHub Actions workflow security, opencode agent instruction contradictions, broken @axe-core/react integration, missing Authorization header in documentActions, and Vercel deployment failure.
background: The comprehensive audit PR (#1) introduced 17 commits fixing security, accessibility, performance, and error handling issues. However, CI/CD checks revealed 7 failing checks: Trivy (63 alerts, 19 high), zizmor (82 alerts, 47 errors), OSV Scanner, PR Validation Quality/Security, Security Scanning Dependency Audit, and Vercel deployment. CodeRabbit also identified 9 critical issues in the PR review. This PRD addresses all of them systematically.
goals: Fix all GitHub Actions workflow security vulnerabilities (template injection, missing permissions)
Resolve contradictory instructions in opencode agent files
Remove broken @axe-core/react integration that fails on React 18+
Fix revalidateOnPublish Authorization header missing issue
Pass all CI/CD checks (Trivy, zizmor, OSV, PR Validation)
Create individual commits for each fix for maximum commit history
non_goals: Fixing all npm audit vulnerabilities (only critical ones addressed)

failing_ci_checks.name: Trivy Filesystem Scan
failing_ci_checks.description: Trivy found security vulnerabilities in dependencies and workflow files

failing_ci_checks.name: zizmor Code Scanning
failing_ci_checks.description: zizmor found GitHub Actions security issues including template injection, missing permissions

failing_ci_checks.name: OSV Scanner
failing_ci_checks.description: OSV found known vulnerabilities in dependencies

failing_ci_checks.name: PR Validation Quality Check
failing_ci_checks.description: Build or lint errors in the PR

coderabbit_critical_issues.issue: startsWith('main') uses JavaScript method syntax instead of GitHub Actions expression function syntax
Auto-approve workflow can approve almost any successful PR, weakening human review
coderabbit_critical_issues.fix: Add actor/label/path policy to restrict auto-approval to trusted automation PRs only

coderabbit_critical_issues.issue: Missing contents: read permission for actions/checkout@v4
coderabbit_critical_issues.fix: Add contents: read to the permissions block

coderabbit_critical_issues.issue: Template injection in github-script — ${{ }} expressions injected directly into JavaScript source
coderabbit_critical_issues.fix: Pass values through env and read via process.env instead of expression interpolation

coderabbit_critical_issues.issue: Template injection — branch value injected directly into JavaScript source
coderabbit_critical_issues.fix: Pass branch via env variable and read via process.env.BRANCH

coderabbit_critical_issues.issue: Contradicts coding guidelines: says 'Always import motion from motion/react' but project uses framer-motion
coderabbit_critical_issues.fix: Update to match project convention: import from 'framer-motion'

coderabbit_critical_issues.issue: Code example shows import from 'motion/react' but project uses 'framer-motion'
coderabbit_critical_issues.fix: Update import path to 'framer-motion' in all agent examples

coderabbit_critical_issues.issue: @axe-core/react is broken: missing ReactDOM arg, not React 18 compatible
coderabbit_critical_issues.fix: Remove @axe-core/react integration entirely; use axe-playwright in CI/CD instead

coderabbit_critical_issues.issue: revalidateOnPublish fetch missing Authorization header — all revalidation requests fail with 401
coderabbit_critical_issues.fix: Add Authorization: Bearer ${process.env.SANITY_API_TOKEN} header to the fetch call

implementation_slices.title: Fix auto-approve.yml — expression syntax and restrict auto-approval
implementation_slices.description: Fix .startsWith() GitHub Actions expression syntax and add actor/label policy to prevent auto-approving all PRs
implementation_slices.commit_message: fix(ci): fix auto-approve workflow expression syntax and restrict to trusted actors

implementation_slices.title: Fix gitleaks.yml — add contents:read permission
implementation_slices.description: Add missing contents: read permission required by actions/checkout@v4
implementation_slices.commit_message: fix(ci): add contents:read permission to gitleaks workflow

implementation_slices.title: Fix problem-detection-advisor.yml — template injection
implementation_slices.description: Pass values through env variables instead of ${{ }} expression interpolation in github-script
implementation_slices.commit_message: fix(ci): fix template injection in problem-detection-advisor workflow

implementation_slices.title: Fix remediation-approval-gate.yml — template injection
implementation_slices.description: Pass branch value through env variable instead of expression interpolation
implementation_slices.commit_message: fix(ci): fix template injection in remediation-approval-gate workflow

implementation_slices.title: Fix monitoring-health.yml — template injection
implementation_slices.description: Pass step outcomes through env variables instead of expression interpolation
implementation_slices.commit_message: fix(ci): fix template injection in monitoring-health workflow

implementation_slices.title: Fix opencode agents — framer-motion import consistency
implementation_slices.description: Update code-reviewer.md and component-creator.md to use framer-motion instead of motion/react
implementation_slices.commit_message: fix(agents): correct framer-motion import path in opencode agent files

implementation_slices.title: Remove broken @axe-core/react from _app.js
implementation_slices.description: Remove the broken A11yAudit component that uses @axe-core/react (not compatible with React 18+)
implementation_slices.commit_message: fix(a11y): remove broken @axe-core/react integration (incompatible with React 18)

implementation_slices.title: Fix documentActions.js — add Authorization header
implementation_slices.description: Add Authorization: Bearer header to the revalidation fetch call so ISR cache invalidation works
implementation_slices.commit_message: fix(sanity): add Authorization header to revalidateOnPublish fetch call

implementation_slices.title: Fix Vercel deployment — resolve build errors
implementation_slices.description: Fix any remaining build errors that prevent Vercel deployment from succeeding
implementation_slices.commit_message: fix(deploy): resolve build errors for Vercel deployment

implementation_slices.title: Update PRD.json with implementation status
implementation_slices.description: Mark all slices as completed in the PRD document
implementation_slices.commit_message: docs(prd): update PRD with implementation status for all audit fixes

risks.risk: Auto-approve workflow may still be too permissive after fix
risks.mitigation: Add label-based gate: only auto-approve PRs labeled 'automated' from known bot actors
A11y checks are now handled by the a11y-audit.js script and CI/CD pipeline

risks.risk: Vercel deployment may fail due to npm audit high-severity findings
risks.mitigation: Use npm audit --audit-level=critical or add .npmrc with audit=false for non-critical

success_criteria: Each fix is a separate commit for rich history
